tool_args.label: Omicron variant impact on subway service
tool_args.raw_text: The surge in COVID cases due to the Omicron variant required service and schedule changes on multiple lines, and performance was measured against the schedule operated each day.

payload.claim_text: The surge in COVID cases due to the Omicron variant required service and schedule changes on multiple lines, and performance was measured against the schedule operated each day.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The surge in COVID cases due to the Omicron variant required service and schedule changes on multiple lines, and performance was measured against the schedule operated each day.

tool_args.label: Ridership recovery post-COVID
tool_args.raw_text: June 2022 ridership compared with June 2019 was lower by 69.6 million (37.0 percent). Subway ridership was lower by 37.8 percent and bus ridership was lower by 35.0 percent.

payload.claim_text: June 2022 ridership compared with June 2019 was lower by 69.6 million (37.0 percent). Subway ridership was lower by 37.8 percent and bus ridership was lower by 35.0 percent.

evidence_refs.source_quote: June 2022 ridership compared with June 2019 was lower by 69.6 million (37.0 percent). Subway ridership was lower by 37.8 percent and bus ridership was lower by 35.0 percent.

tool_args.label: Transit crime increase June 2022
tool_args.raw_text: Total Major Felonies in transit increased 40.9% in June 2022 compared to June 2021

payload.claim_text: Total Major Felonies in transit increased 40.9% in June 2022 compared to June 2021

tool_args.label: NYCT overtime overrun YTD June 2022
tool_args.raw_text: Overtime overruns of $119.7 million (48.7 percent), were largely due to vacancy and availability coverage backfill along with severe weather response.

payload.claim_text: Overtime overruns of $119.7 million (48.7 percent), were largely due to vacancy and availability coverage backfill along with severe weather response.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Overtime overruns of $119.7 million (48.7 percent), were largely due to vacancy and availability coverage backfill along with severe weather response.

tool_args.label: Bus report COVID-19 metric adjustments
tool_args.raw_text: Due to severe disruptions in bus ridership and service associated with the COVID-19 pandemic, this report includes the following adjustments: - AM Pull Out and PM Pull Out metrics and 12-month averages exclude December 27–31, 2021 - 12-month averages for Trips Completed, AM Pull Out, and PM Pull Out metrics exclude April and May 2020 - 12-month averages for ABST, ATT, and CJTP metrics exclude April - August 2020

payload.gap_text: 12-month averages for ABST, ATT, and CJTP metrics exclude April - August 2020
payload.description: COVID-19 pandemic caused exclusion of certain months from bus performance metric 12-month averages

evidence_refs.source_quote: Due to severe disruptions in bus ridership and service associated with the COVID-19 pandemic, this report includes the following adjustments:

tool_args.label: Paratransit drop-off OTP metrics unavailable
tool_args.raw_text: The Drop-off On-Time Performance and Customer Experience metrics are not available to present monthly data comparison due to the temporary suspension of appointment time booking of trips associated with the COVID-19 pandemic which started in March 2020.

payload.gap_text: Drop-off On-Time Performance and Customer Experience metrics are not available
payload.description: Paratransit appointment-based metrics unavailable due to COVID-19 suspension of appointment time booking

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Drop-off On-Time Performance and Customer Experience metrics are not available to present monthly data comparison due to the temporary suspension of appointment time booking of trips associated with the COVID-19 pandemic which started in March 2020.
